obj_ch5_LW01W_slash_Step_0_gml_29_0: T H A N K   Y O U
obj_ch5_LW01W_convo_slash_Create_0_gml_2: * Kris^1, are you feeling all right...?
* I know it is the weekend^1, but...
* You have not left your room all day.
obj_ch5_LW01W_convo_slash_Create_0_gml_3: * The..^1. Festival was today^1, you know.
* The sun is going down now...
* If you get up now^1, you could still see the parade.
* Kris^1, at the very least^1, you should eat something.
obj_ch5_LW01W_convo_slash_Create_0_gml_4: * There is some honey toast on the table downstairs...
* ..^1. well^1, I will be downstairs reading.
* I know it has been difficult without your brother...
obj_ch5_LW01W_convo_slash_Create_0_gml_5: * No one can make you get out of bed^1, honey.
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_78_0: \EC* Could you be a dear and put some toast on?/
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_104_0: \EC* ..^1. and^1, don't forget to put honey on it^1, okay^1, honey?/%
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_121_0: \E4* Busy doing what^1? Flushing the toilet over and over^1? Come on now.../%
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_126_0: \ED* Too busy^1? I see..^1. then I suppose I will just wither away.../%
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_193_0: \E4* Thank you for the honey^1, honey./%
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_218_0: \E9* Kris..^1. how did YOU sleep last night^1, honey?/
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_266_0: \E4* Oh^1, wherever did you learn that wonderful sarcasm from?/
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_281_0: \EF* ..^1. I see^1. I should have suspected you were upset./
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_282_0: \E4* There's only about 80`% as much honey on this as normal./%
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_308_0: \E8* ..^1. I got a bit carried away last night^1, didn't I?/
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_339_0: \E4* Kris^1, is that^1, some sort of joke^1? Haha./
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_340_0: \E1* Kris^1, you know where I hide the extra house key./
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_341_0: \E8* ..^1. I was surprised to find the house empty when I came home at 7./
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_342_0: \E1* I tried calling you straight away./
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_343_0: \E6* But your phone..^1. I could not..^1. get through to it./
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_344_0: \E1* Kris^1, did you take the ICE-E charger^1? You know it does not work./
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_345_0: \EF* Anyhow^1, I was very worried^1. I was about to go looking for you.../
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_346_0: \E8* But Mr. Sans told me..^1. he saw you and Susie..^1. well.../
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_348_0: \EE* ..^1. and^1, well^1. He convinced me^1. Perhaps^1, I should leave you be./%
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_391_0: \E4* Oh..^1. you mean our joke marathon?/
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_392_0: \E0* Haha^1, I had not had one of those in ages.../
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_393_0: \E4* Kris^1, we were really hoping you would join^1, too./
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_394_0: \EE* ..^1. I know you used to like those^1, honey./
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_397_0: \E8* I said some strange things to her last night.../
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_398_0: \EF* Kris^1? Was she okay^1? Did she really go home?/
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_400_0: \EE* ..^1. it was really nice having her over last time./
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_401_0: \EF* I hope she still feels like she can come over./
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_402_0: \E9* ..^1. you hope so too^1, right^1, Kris?/%
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_447_0: \E0* ..^1. oh^1, the Festival is later today^1, is it not?/
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_448_0: \E1* A shame Asriel could not be here to go with you./
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_449_0: \E4* You two had so much fun at those together./
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_450_0: \E9* You would win so many whistles and toys.../
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_452_0: \E5* Hide^1, because you two and your father made so much noise./%
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_482_0: \EE* ..^1. just a little while before we go to bring Asriel home./%
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_495_0: \E0* I wonder if it would be nice to surprise him early....?/
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_496_0: \E4* Appear suddenly at his dormitory^1. What would he think^1? Haha./
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_554_0: \E4* Kris^1, honey..^1. toast^1, honey..^1. honey toast^1. Please./%
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_583_0: \E0* Go have fun at the Festival^1, honey./
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_584_0: \E9* I am certain Susie would love to go with you./%
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_613_0: \E5* Kris!^1! That was just a joke!^1! You do not have to keep flushing!!/
obj_ch5_LW02_slash_Step_0_gml_614_0: \ED* Everyone in this family thinks they are just so funny!!/%
